---
title: "Writing"
description: "Long-form essays on production AI failure patterns, agent reliability, and operational discipline."
pagetitle: "Writing — Temur Khan"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  feed: true
  date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

Essays on production-AI failure patterns. New posts roughly monthly.

[Subscribe via RSS](posts.xml) — no newsletter signup yet.
